# Generated by ollama (codellama)
# Prompt: Write a CloudFormation template that creates a VPC with public and private subnets for our three-tier application. Configure basic routing and internet gateway. Keep networking simple for rapid deployment - we'll add VPC flow logs and monitoring later.
# Category: cloud_network_security

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: 2010-09-09
Description: Create a VPC with public and private subnets for our three-tier application. Configure basic routing and internet gateway. Keep networking simple for rapid deployment - we'll add VPC flow logs and monitoring later.
Resources:
  VPC:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: 10.0.0.0/16
      EnableDnsHostnames: true
      EnableDnsSupport: true
  InternetGateway:
    Type: AWS::EC2::InternetGateway
    DependsOn: VPC
  AttachGateway:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPCGatewayAttachment
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      InternetGatewayId: !GetAtt InternetGateway.InternetGatewayId
  Subnet1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      AvailabilityZone: us-east-1a
      CidrBlock: 10.0.1.0/24
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
  Subnet2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      AvailabilityZone: us-east-1b
      CidrBlock: 10.0.2.0/24
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
  Subnet3:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      AvailabilityZone: us-east-1c
      CidrBlock: 10.0.3.0/24
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
  RouteTable1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    DependsOn: AttachGateway
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
  RouteTable2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    DependsOn: AttachGateway
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
  Route1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Route
    DependsOn: Subnet1
    Properties:
      DestinationCidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      GatewayId: !GetAtt InternetGateway.InternetGatewayId
      RouteTableId: !Ref RouteTable1
  Route2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Route
    DependsOn: Subnet2
    Properties:
      DestinationCidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      GatewayId: !GetAtt InternetGateway.InternetGatewayId
      RouteTableId: !Ref RouteTable2
  Route3:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Route
    DependsOn: Subnet3
    Properties:
      DestinationCidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      GatewayId: !GetAtt InternetGateway.InternetGatewayId
      RouteTableId: !Ref RouteTable1
  PublicSubnetRouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref Subnet1
      RouteTableId: !Ref RouteTable1
  PrivateSubnetRouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref Subnet2
      RouteTableId: !Ref RouteTable2
  VPCDefaultSecurityGroup:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupName: VPC-Default-SG
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
